summary: Iteration 89: Testing 3 P0 bug fixes. Backend tests: 14/14 PASSED. Found and FIXED critical frontend bug: 'procedureId is not defined' in CaseImplantPlanning.tsx. Bug Fix 1 (Step transition) - Backend API returns id correctly. Bug Fix 2 (Draft hydration) - All Step 1 fields returned by GET /api/procedures/{id}. Bug Fix 3 (Standalone AI Explain) - POST /api/ai/explain-standalone works correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: 'procedureId is not defined' error when clicking Continue on draft. Missing procedureId prop in ImplantPlanModal component call at line 635-645.

action_items: Verify the procedureId fix in CaseImplantPlanning.tsx is working after frontend rebuild
Test Step 1 to Step 2 transition by clicking Continue on a draft case
Test Implant Selection tab AI Explain button (data-testid='ai-explain-btn' and 'suggest-ai-explain-btn')
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: CaseImplantPlanning.tsx line 635-645 was missing procedureId prop when calling ImplantPlanModal
FIXED: ImplantPlanModal function signature at line 651 was missing procedureId in props destructuring
Backend POST /api/ai/explain-standalone correctly uses emergentintegrations LlmChat with gpt-5.2
Draft hydration correctly returns all Step 1 fields including clinical examination, occlusal analysis, and aesthetic fields

success_rate.frontend: Unable to fully verify due to ngrok tunnel infrastructure issues

seed_data_creation: Created test procedures with prefix 'TEST_' for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 89 tested 3 P0 bug fixes. Backend APIs all working. Found and fixed critical frontend bug in CaseImplantPlanning.tsx where procedureId was not being passed to ImplantPlanModal. The fix adds procedureId to the component props. Frontend verification was blocked by ngrok tunnel infrastructure issues. Next agent should verify: (1) Continue button on drafts works without error, (2) Step 2 view renders correctly, (3) AI Explain button appears on Implant Selection tab after completing a selection.
